/**
     * Returns a newly-created immutable bimap. The iteration order of the returned bimap is the
     * order in which entries were inserted into the builder, unless {@link #orderEntriesByValue}
     * was called, in which case entries are sorted by value.
     *
     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if duplicate keys or values were added
     */
javadoc_after:
/** * Returns a newly-created immutable bimap. The iteration order of the returned bimap is the * order in which entries were inserted into the builder, unless {@link #orderEntriesByValue} * was called, in which case entries are sorted by value. * *

Prefer the equivalent method {@link #buildOrThrow()} to make it explicit that the method * will throw an exception if there are duplicate keys or values. The {@code build()} method * will soon be deprecated. * * @throws IllegalArgumentException if duplicate keys or values were added */
